title: Statistical Mechanics Homework: Normalization and Particle Classification
desc: Normalizing a probability distribution and classifying particles as bosons or fermions.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six complex series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals, Stokes' theorem, and complex line integrals in multivariable calculus.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and summation formulas for power series in advanced calculus.

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proofs on metric spaces, Cauchy sequences, and integral inequalities in analysis.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework on Minima and Closed Sets
desc: Proving existence of minima for coercive functions and extremal values on the unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A set of partial derivative problems with solutions for advanced calculus students.

title: Implicit Function Theorem in Advanced Calculus
desc: Proving existence and computing derivatives of an implicit function from a cubic equation.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Three multivariable integration problems solved using coordinate transformations.

title: Ellipsoid Area and Surface Integrals
desc: Deriving area formulas for ellipsoids and spheres using double integrals.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Proofs and Trigonometric Identities
desc: A complex analysis assignment proving a modulus identity and deriving trigonometric formulas using Euler's formula.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Residue Theorem
desc: Calculating integrals using the residue theorem with detailed solutions.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using the residue theorem to evaluate three challenging improper integrals with branch cuts.

title: Complex Functions Homework: Trigonometric Identities
desc: Proofs of complex sine/cosine addition formulas and hyperbolic identities.

title: Analyzing Multivalued Functions and Branch Points
desc: A technical analysis of multivalued functions, branch points, and path-dependent evaluations in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis Homework Solutions
desc: Solutions for contour integrals and function analysis in complex variables.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Series Convergence Tests
desc: Analyzing convergence of positive and complex series with counterexamples.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence radii, sum functions, and series sums in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis: Taylor Series Expansions
desc: Taylor series expansions for secant, logarithmic, and square root functions in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis: Laurent Series Expansions
desc: Detailed Laurent expansions for rational and logarithmic functions in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Analytic Continuation
desc: Proofs on analytic continuation, series convergence, and function singularities in complex analysis.

title: Spherical Harmonics Expansion and PDE Solutions
desc: Expanding functions in spherical harmonics and solving Poisson equations with boundary conditions.

title: Math Physics Equations Homework Solutions
desc: Solving integrals with Bessel functions and proving trigonometric identities.

title: Critical Radius Calculations for Nuclear Fuel
desc: Deriving critical radii for cylindrical and spherical uranium blocks using diffusion equations.

title: Mathematical Physics Equations Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs for delta function identities and coordinate transformations in physics.

title: Solving Forced Vibration with Laplace Transforms
desc: A step-by-step solution to a damped oscillator driven by a harmonic force using Laplace transforms.

title: Solving 1D Green's Function for Boundary Problems
desc: Deriving Green's function for a second-order ODE with boundary conditions and applying it to solve a related problem.

title: Solving Laplace's Equation with Boundary Conditions
desc: Step-by-step solution using separation of variables for a 2D Laplace equation.
